source: Local proof: hermes kanban --help exposes Kanban CLI verbs; config.yaml has kanban settings and platform_toolsets.cli includes kanban; official docs at https://hermes-agent.nousresearch.com/docs/user-guide/features/kanban describe model-facing kanban_* tools and /kanban; current hermes skills list probes did not show devops/kanban-orchestrator or devops/kanban-worker.
invocation_path: Bridge through Hermes kanban surfaces: kanban_* toolset for model workers, hermes kanban CLI, /kanban slash command, and the bundled dashboard plugin.

source: Local proof: google-workspace skill is installed but disabled and its SKILL.md covers Sheets; no dedicated Excel/xlsx Hermes skill or configured spreadsheet MCP server was found; mcp_servers is empty in config.yaml.
